blocking_export_risks: Folded ER sheets use source-art smoothing and should be exported as simplified LOD meshes.
Ribosome dots should be instanced, merged, or baked into far-distance texture/normal detail.
The lumen continuity material and sheet lumen ribbons use transparency and need Roblox Studio validation.
The rough ER connection should remain a toggleable/context layer if it competes with nucleus inspection views.
recommended_roblox_plan: Create a high-detail source mesh, medium LOD sheet mesh, and low LOD silhouette sheet.
Use instanced ribosome markers near inspection cameras and texture/normal detail for distant ribosome density.
Represent the lumen continuity band and sheet lumen ribbons as low-opacity Beams or MeshPart strips with fallback opaque materials.
Attach the whole group under RoughER_Connection with a stable pivot for later cell assembly.
